empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please provide us with some additional information so that we can assist you better? For instance, have you tried using any other charging cables or checking your power settings to see if there might be an issue there? We want to make sure everything else on our end is working properly before we move forward with troubleshooting further solutions. Please let me know what steps you've taken already and anything else relevant details you think may help us find a resolution quickly.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out again regarding my <PRODUCT>, order number <ORDER_ID>, which I purchased just three weeks ago. As I mentioned in my previous support request last week, the battery is draining completely within 2 hours of a full charge, which is making it impossible for me to meet my deadlines. I followed the advice I was given last time and updated the drivers, but unfortunately, the issue persists. With a critical client deadline looming tomorrow, I urgently need a more effective solution to this problem, and I would appreciate it if we could resolve this today.
